message.content:
I need to build a File Search screen for a Raycast UI clone project. Explore the codebase to understand:

1. Read src/components/clipboard_history/clipboard_history_view.tsx (as a pattern reference for a full screen view)
2. Read src/data/clipboard_data.ts (as a pattern reference for mock data)
3. Read src/components/snippet_manager/snippet_manager_view.tsx (another pattern reference)
4. Read src/types.ts for existing type definitions
5. Read src/components/icons/ - specifically index.ts and any file-related icons (Document, Folder icons)
6. Read App.tsx to understand how views are wired in
7. Check what icons exist in object_icons.tsx

Provide the full content of each file so I can understand the patterns used.

content.text: I'll explore the codebase to understand the patterns used in your Raycast UI clone. Let me read all the relevant files in parallel.

9→ tags: { 10→ text: string; 11→ color?: TagColor; 12→ }[]; 13→ createdAt: Date; 14→} 15→ 16→export type SnippetCategory = SnippetEntry['category']; 17→ 18→const SNIPPET_CATEGORY_VALUES: SnippetCategory[] = [ 19→ 'general', 20→ 'code', 21→ 'email', 22→ 'template', 23→]; 24→ 25→export function isSnippetCategory(v: string): v is SnippetCategory { 26→ return (SNIPPET_CATEGORY_VALUES as string[]).includes(v); 27→} 28→ 29→const now = Date.now(); 30→ 31→export const SNIPPET_CATEGORIES = [ 32→ { 33→ label: 'General', 34→ value: 'general', 35→ }, 36→ { 37→ label: 'Code', 38→ value: 'code', 39→ }, 40→ { 41→ label: 'Email', 42→ value: 'email', 43→ }, 44→ { 45→ label: 'Template', 46→ value: 'template', 47→ }, 48→] as const;
